subject: Change admportal port map
commit_message:
Change admportal port map

Update SDNC admin portal to map https port (8443) to its node port instead
of its http port (8543).

Change-Id: Ibfc242853d28c4915d7150e41595edbcfa077447
Issue-ID: OJSI-98
Signed-off-by: Timoney, Dan (dt5972) <dtimoney@att.com>

entries.message:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 2 on the queue.
